summary: Rehearsed the current Codex orchestration path for FOUNDATION-008 through real task state updates, real qa_reviewer spawn, registry update, and preparation of this routed owner handoff. No game code, dependency, architecture, or business-content files were modified.

tests_run.result: Fetched origin successfully before starting FOUNDATION-008.
Already on main; branch up to date with origin/main.
main includes fbc2db7 chore(tasks): close foundation 001 after integration, 84876d3 Bootstrap approved integration, d7ccbee model routing amendment, and 486ef3c foundation monorepo baseline.
Created and switched to the dedicated FOUNDATION-008 branch.
Spawned real qa_reviewer subthread with agent_id 019ef4ed-ff31-7df0-89af-30c06222718c and read-only review instructions.
Registered qa_reviewer thread ID 019ef4ed-ff31-7df0-89af-30c06222718c in the task file and thread registry.
FOUNDATION-001 CLOSED; FOUNDATION-008 REVIEW; FOUNDATION-002 through FOUNDATION-007 remain DRAFT.
Only FOUNDATION-002 remains a dependency-satisfied DRAFT candidate while FOUNDATION-008 is in REVIEW.
On chore/foundation-008-orchestration-rehearsal with modified project/tasks/active/FOUNDATION-008.json and project/tasks/thread-registry.json before writing this handoff.

decisions: FOUNDATION-001 is CLOSED on main after verified integration at fbc2db7; FOUNDATION-008 dependency is satisfied and was not used to reopen FOUNDATION-001.
FOUNDATION-008 owner remains lead_orchestrator and reviewer is qa_reviewer.
The real qa_reviewer thread ID for this rehearsal is 019ef4ed-ff31-7df0-89af-30c06222718c.
The current owner handoff routes to qa_reviewer for independent review; lead will not mark ACCEPTED until the reviewer returns ACCEPT and the route evidence is persisted.
risks: The current lead thread actual model and effort are still not observable from repository state, so model-routing-state keeps them as unknown.

The native spawn_agent tool exposes model and reasoning overrides but no explicit sandbox_mode parameter; the reviewer was therefore instructed to follow read-only QA posture and not modify game code, architecture, dependencies, docs, or task state.
requested_action: Independently verify the FOUNDATION-008 orchestration rehearsal evidence, including task status flow, real qa_reviewer thread registration, handoff validity, route_to correctness, route delivery evidence after send_input, and scope boundaries. Return exactly ACCEPT, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCK, and emit a structured reviewer handoff with route_to=lead_orchestrator.
